# Versioning Best Practices

> Proven patterns for semantic versioning, changelog enforcement, and release management.

## Entries

- [Major.Minor.Patch.Build Versioning](major-minor-patch-build.md): Four-segment version format with Build incrementing on every commit. RECOMMENDED.
- [Changelog Enforcement via Commit Rules](changelog-enforcement.md): Path-scoped rule requiring CHANGELOG.md updates on every commit. RECOMMENDED.
